name: Per Transaction Settings (Redesign)
description: Redesigned settings page for per-transaction mode. All 11 tabs with improved hierarchy, consistent toggles, updated copy per Synder vocabulary, proper grouping, and clean modern design.

changes: All 11 sidebar tabs: General, Sales, Invoices, Products/Services, Product mapping, Taxes, Fees, Application Fees, Expenses, Payouts, Multicurrency
Clean card-based layout with grouped settings
Consistent On/Off toggles everywhere (no more Yes/No)
All copy follows Synder vocabulary (Integration, Books, Enable/Disable, etc.)
Recommended badges on Auto-import and Auto-sync (not in description text)
Proper upsell components with 'Higher plan' messaging
Sub-fields that appear/disappear with toggle state
Single toast on Update (not triple-stacked)
Dependency indicators (Auto-sync requires Auto-import)
Section grouping within tabs (Import & sync, Currency & localization, etc.)
Transaction type tabs (Default, Adjustment, Chargeback) with Add button
Slim app sidebar + settings sidebar layout
Interactive: toggles work, tabs switch, dropdowns functional, toast on save

name: Platform Transactions (Per Transaction)
description: Copy of the current Platform Transactions page in per-transaction mode. Base for Archived transactions preview update.

changes: Exact copy of current Platform Transactions page (per-transaction mode)
Full sidebar (visible, non-interactive)
All columns: Transaction info, Transaction type, Amount, Transaction date, Sync status
Column filters: Type dropdown, Status dropdown, Date range picker
Toolbar: Actions dropdown (Sync, Rollback, Cancel, Archive, Unarchive, Export to csv, Export all pending to csv)
Select all transactions, Reset all filters, Search, Import historical data
See transactions in books CTA
Per-row actions menu: Sync, Show sync info, Rollback, Archive
Checkbox bulk selection with count
Status badges: Synced (green), Ready to Sync (blue), Pending (yellow)
Explain link on synced transactions
Pagination
25 sample transactions matching production data

name: Variant A: Full-Screen Overlay
description: Reconciliation as true full-screen overlays — no sidebar or top bar visible during reconciliation

changes: True full-screen overlay covering sidebar and top bar
Basic account select → overlay flow
Context bar when navigating to Transaction Recon
Rebuilt to match actual Synder flows
Balance Recon: account select (grouped: Clearing/Assets) → tabs (Reconciliation / History)
Form: Beginning balance (USD) + 'How to change beginning balance' link → Reconcile using + Ending balance → Ending date → Start reconciliation
History tab with filters and table (empty state with CTA)
Working view as full-screen overlay: summary banner with formula, Investigate CTA, checkbox transaction table
Transaction Recon: table view + Add reconciliation button
Empty state: illustration + Start reconciling + FAQ
Create form overlay with context bar from Balance Recon

name: Variant B: Normal Pages
description: Reconciliation as standard pages with sidebar, top bar, and breadcrumb navigation

changes: Standard page layout with sidebar and top bar always visible
Breadcrumb navigation
Context banner when navigating from Balance to Txn recon
Rebuilt to match actual Synder flows
Balance Recon: account select → tabs → form (Beginning balance + link, Reconcile using + Ending balance, Ending date) → Start reconciliation
Working view: inline page with summary banner, Investigate CTA, checkbox transaction table
Breadcrumbs update as user drills deeper
Transaction Recon: table view (TXN_EMPTY flag for empty state demo)
Empty state: bank illustration + Start reconciling + FAQ accordions
Create form as inline page with Cancel + Start matching buttons
Context banner from Balance Recon with pre-filled fields
Pre-filled fields from balance context, Cancel returns to correct previous page

name: Original: Reconciliation Flow (v1)
description: First prototype — context bar between Balance and Transaction reconciliation (partial overlay, sidebar visible)

changes: Initial prototype
Balance Reconciliation partial overlay (sidebar visible)
Investigate CTA on Difference card
Transition to Transaction Recon with context bar
Pre-filled form fields, auto-save toast
